meta_description: eMachineShop provides affordable rubber compression molding services. Protypes and production. 50+ Materials. FREE Shipping in the USA. 100% Quality Guaranteed.

sections.heading: Compression Molding Services
sections.text: Service Overview Compression Molding Services Compression molding creates rubber parts by forcing a heated block of rubber into a metal cavity of the part shape. eMachineShop offers cost-effective rubber compression molding solutions whether you need a hundred pieces or a large production order. 50+ Materials. FREE Shipping in the USA. 100% Quality Guaranteed. As Seen In: Advantages Economical for large quantities Metallic inserts can be added Draft not required No ejection marks Applications O-rings Seals Gaskets Pulleys What is Rubber Compression Molding?
